_notes: Canonical MCP server config for starttoscale-plugin. Edit only this file. Run scripts/render-mcp.py to regenerate .mcp.json / .gemini/settings.json / .codex/config.toml / .vscode/mcp.json.

stromy-format._notes: Hosted format skills (format-pptx, format-pptx-hd, format-docx, format-pdf, format-pdf-hd, format-xlsx, format-mermaid, format-diagram, format-chart, format-video-hd). Fetched at runtime via fs_read — see skills/<name>/SKILL.md stubs.
